page.title: List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province

revision.comment: 各国の式内社表の掲載。ただし、式内比定社は現在名神大社のみの状態、国史見在社・式外社も未掲載の状態。
revision.text:
'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、小社6座6社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[河村郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''倭文神社'''||シトリノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''波波伎神社'''||ハハキノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[久米郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''倭文神社'''||シトリノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''国坂神社'''||クサカノ
クニサカノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[会見郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''胸形神社'''||ムナカタノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大神山神社'''||オホムワノ
オホカミヤマノ||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} [[Category:伯耆国の式内社|*]]

revision.comment: /* 式内社 */ 凡例追記。
revision.text:
'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、小社6座6社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（5を参照）における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。
5）「集成」列は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」）における神社項へのリンク先を記載。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[河村郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''倭文神社'''||シトリノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''波波伎神社'''||ハハキノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[久米郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''倭文神社'''||シトリノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''国坂神社'''||クサカノ
クニサカノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[会見郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''胸形神社'''||ムナカタノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大神山神社'''||オホムワノ
オホカミヤマノ||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} [[Category:伯耆国の式内社|*]]

revision.text:
'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、小社6座6社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（5を参照）における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。
5）「集成」列は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」）における神社項へのリンク先を記載。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[河村郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''倭文神社'''||シトリノ||小||||[[倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|倭文神社]]||[[鳥取県]][[東伯郡]][[湯梨浜町]]宮内|||| |- |'''波波伎神社'''||ハハキノ||小||||[[波波伎神社]]||鳥取県[[倉吉市]]福庭|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[久米郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''倭文神社'''||シトリノ||小||||倭文神社||鳥取県倉吉市志津|||| |- |'''国坂神社'''||クサカノ
クニサカノ||小||||国坂神社||鳥取県東伯郡[[北栄町]]国坂|||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[会見郡]]''' 2座（並小） |- |'''胸形神社'''||ムナカタノ||小||||宗形神社||鳥取県[[米子市]]宗像|||| |- |'''大神山神社'''||オホムワノ
オホカミヤマノ||小||||[[大神山神社]]||鳥取県米子市尾高|||| |} {{-}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} [[Category:伯耆国の式内社|*]]

revision.comment: /* 式内社 */ [[プロジェクト‐ノート:神道#各郡記事の式内社の掲載について]]の議論に基づき、記載方法変更。

式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のテンプレート化、国会図書館リンクの修正。

revision.text:
'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} {{式内社一覧/footer}}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション
== 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」
{{式内社一覧}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ほうきのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[ja:伯耆国の式内社一覧]]

revision.text:
'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|式内社一覧/凡例}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション
== 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」

'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn
== 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」

revision.text:
'''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn
== 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn
== 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧}} {{伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''{{nihongo|Kawamura District|河村郡|Kawamura-gun}}''' 2 shrines (Normal Minor){{Tnavbar|伯耆国河村郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|伯耆国河村郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|11=伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''{{nihongo|Wabun Shrine|倭文神社|Wabun jinja}}'''||shitorino||Shikinai Shosha||||{{ill|Wabun Shrine|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|lt=Wabun Shrine|lt_ja=倭文神社|12=draft}}||{{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}{{ill|Tōhaku District|ja|東伯郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Yurihama Town|ja|湯梨浜町|12=draft}}宮内||Boki Province{{ill|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮|12=draft}}|| |- |'''{{nihongo|Hahaki Shrine|波波伎神社|Hahaki jinja}}'''||hahakino||Shikinai Shosha||||{{ill|Hahaki Shrine|ja|波波伎神社|12=draft}}||{{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}{{ill|Kurayoshi City|ja|倉吉市|12=draft}}福庭|||| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[久米郡 (鳥取県)|久米郡]]''' 2座（並小）{{Tnavbar|伯耆国久米郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|伯耆国久米郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|11=伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''倭文神社'''||shitorino||Shikinai Shosha||||倭文神社||鳥取県倉吉市志津||伯耆国三宮|| |- |'''国坂神社'''||kusakano
kunisakano||Shikinai Shosha||||国坂神社||鳥取県東伯郡[[北栄町]]国坂|||| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[会見郡]]''' 2座（並小）{{Tnavbar|伯耆国会見郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|伯耆国会見郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|11=伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''胸形神社'''||munakatano||Shikinai Shosha||||宗形神社||鳥取県[[米子市]]宗像|||| |- |'''大神山神社'''||ohomuwano
ohokamiyamano||Shikinai Shosha||||[[Ōgamiyama Shrine]]||鳥取県米子市尾高||伯耆国二宮|| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|ほうきのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{draft categories| [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] }} [[ja:伯耆国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:伯耆国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] {{DEFAULTSORT:伯耆国河村郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:伯耆国久米郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:伯耆国会見郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}}

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''伯耆国の式内社一覧'''（ほうきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[伯耆国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''{{nihongo|Kawamura District|河村郡|Kawamura-gun}}''' 2 shrines (Normal Minor){{Tnavbar|伯耆国河村郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|伯耆国河村郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|11=伯耆国河村郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''{{nihongo|Wabun Shrine|倭文神社|Wabun jinja}}'''||shitorino||Shikinai Shosha||||{{ill|Wabun Shrine|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|lt=Wabun Shrine|lt_ja=倭文神社|12=draft}}||{{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}{{ill|Tōhaku District|ja|東伯郡|12=draft}}{{ill|Yurihama Town|ja|湯梨浜町|12=draft}}宮内||Boki Province{{ill|Ichinomiya|ja|一宮|12=draft}}|| |- |'''{{nihongo|Hahaki Shrine|波波伎神社|Hahaki jinja}}'''||hahakino||Shikinai Shosha||||{{ill|Hahaki Shrine|ja|波波伎神社|12=draft}}||{{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}{{ill|Kurayoshi City|ja|倉吉市|12=draft}}福庭|||| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[久米郡 (鳥取県)|久米郡]]''' 2座（並小）{{Tnavbar|伯耆国久米郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|伯耆国久米郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|11=伯耆国久米郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''倭文神社'''||shitorino||Shikinai Shosha||||倭文神社||鳥取県倉吉市志津||伯耆国三宮|| |- |'''国坂神社'''||kusakano
kunisakano||Shikinai Shosha||||国坂神社||鳥取県東伯郡[[北栄町]]国坂|||| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[会見郡]]''' 2座（並小）{{Tnavbar|伯耆国会見郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|伯耆国会見郡のList of Shikinai Shrines|11=伯耆国会見郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''胸形神社'''||munakatano||Shikinai Shosha||||宗形神社||鳥取県[[米子市]]宗像|||| |- |'''大神山神社'''||ohomuwano
ohokamiyamano||Shikinai Shosha||||[[Ōgamiyama Shrine]]||鳥取県米子市尾高||伯耆国二宮|| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|ほうきのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] }} [[ja:伯耆国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:伯耆国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:伯耆国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] {{citation needed|伯耆国河村郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|伯耆国久米郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|伯耆国会見郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province}}

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Hōki Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of LALALAList of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Hōki Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. Or the list of shrines in Hōki Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Hōki Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Hōki Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Hōki Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Hōki Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: Text replacement - "Engishiki Jinmyocho" to "Engishiki Jinmyōchō"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Hōki Province|Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Hōki Province|Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、小社6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! ohokamiyamano||Shikinai Shosha||||[[Ōgamiyama Shrine]]||鳥取県米子市尾高||伯耆国二宮|| |- |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate40.html 伯耆国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{List of Shikinaisha}} {{translated page|ja|伯耆国の式内社一覧|version=56551121|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[Category:completion tier 1]][[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]][[Category:completion tier 1]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] }} [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] [[ja:伯耆国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:伯耆国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:伯耆国のList of Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11381490]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Hōki Province|Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Hōki Province|Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts **6 shikinaisha** in the province – **6 shosha** and **0 taisha**.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11381490]]}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 6 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank |- | 1 || {{ill|Shitori Shrine|WD=Q245734}} || || Shikinai Shosha |- | 2 || {{ill|Hahaki-jinja|WD=Q11555561}} || || Shikinai Shosha |- | 3 || {{ill|Shitorino shrine|WD=Q135040758}} || シトリノ || Shikinai Shosha |- | 4 || {{ill|Kusakano shrine|WD=Q135040759}} || クサカノ || Shikinai Shosha |- | 5 || {{ill|Munakatano shrine|WD=Q135040760}} || ムナカタノ || Shikinai Shosha |- | 6 || {{ill|Ōgamiyama Shrine|WD=Q251160}} || || Shikinai Shosha |}

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:36, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 6 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:15, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Hōki Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Hōki Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 6 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Hōki Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 6 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 0 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Hōki Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 6 Shikinai Shōsha and 0 Shikinai Taisha.
